item.title: Home First Finance Company India Ltd Hits Intraday High with 7.05% Surge
item.description: Home First Finance Company India Ltd recorded a robust intraday performance on 10 Mar 2026, surging to a day’s high of Rs 1115.5, marking a 7.51% increase from its previous close. The stock outperformed its sector and the broader market, reflecting strong trading momentum throughout the session. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Laxmi Organic Industries Ltd Hits Intraday High with 7.41% Surge on 10 Mar 2026
item.description: Laxmi Organic Industries Ltd recorded a robust intraday performance on 10 Mar 2026, surging to a day’s high of Rs 125.95, marking a 7.88% increase from its previous close. This strong uptick outpaced the Specialty Chemicals sector by 6.29% and reflected continued positive momentum over the last two trading sessions. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Transport Corporation of India Ltd Hits Intraday High with 7.74% Surge
item.description: Transport Corporation of India Ltd recorded a robust intraday performance today, surging to a day’s high of Rs 1,035.85, marking a significant 7.74% increase. This sharp uptick outpaced the broader Transport Services sector and the Sensex, reflecting notable trading momentum and a reversal after two days of decline. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Vindhya Telelinks Ltd Hits Intraday High with 8.36% Surge on 10 Mar 2026
item.description: Vindhya Telelinks Ltd recorded a robust intraday performance on 10 Mar 2026, surging 8.36% to touch a day’s high of Rs 1,068.8. This significant uptick outpaced the broader Sensex, which gained a modest 0.66% amid a volatile trading session. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: RattanIndia Enterprises Ltd Hits Intraday High with 8.1% Surge on 10 Mar 2026
item.description: RattanIndia Enterprises Ltd recorded a robust intraday performance on 10 Mar 2026, surging to a day’s high of Rs 26.67, marking an 8.06% increase. This notable uptick reversed a two-day decline and outpaced the broader E-Retail/ E-Commerce sector by 6.25%, reflecting a significant shift in trading momentum amid a mixed market backdrop. Time: 10 minutes ago

item.title: Palred Technologies Ltd Falls to 52-Week Low Amid Continued Downtrend
item.description: Palred Technologies Ltd has reached a new 52-week low, closing just 0.25% above its lowest price of Rs 28.47. The stock’s persistent decline reflects ongoing pressures within the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, with the share price falling sharply over recent weeks and underperforming its sector peers and broader market benchmarks. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Stallion India Fluorochemicals Ltd witnessed a robust surge in its share price on 10 Mar 2026, hitting the upper circuit limit of 5% to close at ₹106.92. This sharp rally was driven by intense buying interest, resulting in a maximum daily gain and a regulatory freeze on further trading, underscoring the stock’s renewed momentum after a prolonged downtrend. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Sonu Infratech Ltd Plunges to Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Shares of Sonu Infratech Ltd plunged to their lower circuit limit on 10 Mar 2026, closing at a new 52-week low of ₹57.2. The stock witnessed intense selling pressure, underperforming its sector and broader market indices as panic selling gripped investors amid deteriorating fundamentals and a recent downgrade to a Strong Sell rating. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: AAA Technologies Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit on Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Shares of AAA Technologies Ltd surged to hit the upper circuit limit on 10 Mar 2026, closing at ₹94.73, marking a maximum daily gain of 5.0%. This sharp rally was driven by robust buying interest despite an opening gap down, reflecting renewed investor enthusiasm in the Commercial Services & Supplies sector amid subdued market conditions. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Kshitij Polyline Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Kshitij Polyline Ltd, a micro-cap player in the diversified consumer products sector, surged to hit its upper circuit limit on 10 Mar 2026, registering a maximum daily gain of 4.78%. The stock closed at ₹2.41, reflecting robust buying interest despite trading below all key moving averages, signalling a notable shift in market sentiment amid subdued liquidity conditions. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Vaxtex Cotfab Ltd Hits Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Shares of Vaxtex Cotfab Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Garments & Apparels sector, witnessed a sharp decline on 10 Mar 2026, hitting the lower circuit limit of ₹1.75, marking a maximum daily loss of 4.89%. The stock underperformed both its sector and the broader market, reflecting intense selling pressure and panic among investors. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Adani Green Energy Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Mixed Market Signals
item.description: Adani Green Energy Ltd has witnessed a notable 12.04% increase in open interest in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and shifting investor positioning. Despite this surge, the stock’s performance remains subdued relative to its sector, reflecting a complex interplay of bullish and bearish sentiments among traders. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Flexituff Ventures International Ltd Plunges to Lower Circuit Amid Heavy Selling Pressure
item.description: Flexituff Ventures International Ltd, a micro-cap player in the Garments & Apparels sector, witnessed intense selling pressure on 10 Mar 2026, hitting its lower circuit limit and recording a maximum daily loss of 4.91%. The stock’s sharp decline reflects mounting investor concerns amid deteriorating technical and fundamental indicators. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Sanco Industries Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure
item.description: Sanco Industries Ltd, a micro-cap player in the diversified consumer products sector, surged to hit its upper circuit limit on 10 Mar 2026, reflecting robust buying interest and a maximum daily gain of 2.22%. The stock closed at ₹2.30, marking a significant move in a relatively illiquid market environment. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Premier Ltd Surges to Upper Circuit Amid Robust Buying Pressure
item.description: Premier Ltd, a micro-cap player in the industrial manufacturing sector, witnessed a remarkable surge on 10 Mar 2026, hitting its upper circuit price limit of ₹3.02. This sharp rally was driven by robust buying interest, resulting in a maximum daily gain of 4.86%, significantly outperforming its sector and benchmark indices. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Shines with 1.31% Gain Amid Broad Market Strength
item.description: The mid-cap segment, represented by the BSE MIDCAP 150 index, demonstrated resilient performance with a 1.31% gain on 10 Mar 2026, consolidating its position as the best-performing segment in recent trading sessions. This upward momentum was supported by robust breadth and positive technical upgrades across key stocks, signalling renewed investor confidence in mid-sized companies. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Sees Surge in Call Option Activity Ahead of March Expiry
item.description: Mazagon Dock Shipbuilders Ltd (MAZDOCK) has emerged as the most actively traded stock in the call options segment, with significant bullish positioning observed ahead of the 30 March 2026 expiry. The aerospace and defence heavyweight outperformed its sector and broader market indices, reflecting growing investor confidence amid improving fundamentals and technical momentum. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: ABB India Ltd Sees Significant Open Interest Surge Amid Bullish Market Positioning
item.description: ABB India Ltd has witnessed a significant surge in open interest (OI) in its derivatives segment, signalling heightened market activity and potential directional bets. The stock’s recent outperformance, coupled with rising volumes and improved technical positioning, suggests growing investor confidence in the heavy electrical equipment sector. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd Sees Robust Trading Activity Amid Strong Buy Rating
item.description: Multi Commodity Exchange of India Ltd (MCX) has emerged as one of the most actively traded stocks by value in the capital markets sector, reflecting heightened institutional interest and significant order flow. The stock’s recent performance, coupled with its strong technical positioning and upgraded rating, underscores its appeal among investors navigating the mid-cap space. Time: 11 minutes ago

item.title: IZMO Ltd Hits Upper Circuit Amid Strong Buying Pressure and Robust Gains
item.description: Shares of IZMO Ltd, a player in the Computers - Software & Consulting sector, surged to hit the upper circuit limit on 10 Mar 2026, closing at ₹746.75, marking a maximum daily gain of 5.0%. This sharp rally was driven by strong buying interest and heightened investor participation, signalling renewed optimism in the micro-cap software firm. Time: 11 minutes ago
